IReadBaseNotFoundMessage Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Specifies a message that will be sent to the client when a specific entity was requested, but this entity cannot be found.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Crud
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
ITranslatable NotFoundMessage { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: ITranslatable
Remarks
If this property is null, a generic "Not found" message is used.
